scope.target: Candidate and user-tag-triggered GitHub Actions publication

steps: Assemble release body and upload artifacts
execution.last_completed_step: Added read-only candidate automation and user-tag-authorized draft-to-published release automation.

results.summary: Candidate automation builds and validates artifacts without release writes; publish automation accepts only a user-pushed version tag, isolates contents:write, and never creates or moves tags.
tests_run: Workflow YAML and embedded Bash parse
Static trigger, permission, draft ordering, idempotency, and no-tag-mutation assertions
results.residual_risk: Hosted GitHub Actions execution remains an external post-merge/tag verification step.
